name: zebra-label-printer-js
description: WinCC OA JavaScript manager that reads data from datapoints (dpConnect) and prints ZPL labels on Zebra printers, either directly over TCP/IP or through the Windows print spooler. The DPE-to-field mapping is stored as JSON inside a configuration DPE.

comments.winccoa-manager: Provided by the WinCC OA installation, NOT on the public npm registry. Install it from the local path, e.g.: npm install file:/opt/WinCC_OA/3.21/javascript/winccoa-manager (Linux) or npm install file:C:/Siemens/Automation/WinCC_OA/3.21/javascript/winccoa-manager (Windows). The manager lazy-requires it at runtime.
comments.@thiagoelg/node-printer: Only needed for the Windows spooler print mode. It is a native addon (node-gyp); it is declared as optional so installation does not fail on hosts without build tools. It is lazy-required only when spooler mode is used.
